tools.name: get_selection
tools.description: Get text selection. Returns current selection if an editor is active, otherwise returns the latest cached selection. The "current" field indicates if this is from the active editor (true) or cached (false).

tools.name: get_diagnostics
tools.description: Gets language diagnostics (errors, warnings, hints) from VS Code

uri.description: File URI to get diagnostics for. Optional. If not provided, returns diagnostics for all files.

tools.name: update_session_name
tools.description: Update the display name for the current CLI session

tools.name: open_diff
tools.description: Opens a diff view comparing original file content with new content. Blocks until user accepts, rejects, or closes the diff.

new_file_contents.description: The new file contents to compare against

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the content of a file.

filePath.description: Absolute path to the file to read

tools.name: close_diff
tools.description: Closes a diff tab by its tab name. Use this when the client rejects an edit to close the corresponding diff view.

tab_name.description: The tab name of the diff to close (must match the tab_name used when opening the diff)

tools.name: get_vscode_info
tools.description: Get information about the current VS Code instance

tools.name: get_selection
tools.description: Get text selection. Returns current selection if an editor is active, otherwise returns the latest cached selection. The "current" field indicates if this is from the active editor (true) or cached (false).

tools.name: get_diagnostics
tools.description: Gets language diagnostics (errors, warnings, hints) from VS Code

uri.description: File URI to get diagnostics for. Optional. If not provided, returns diagnostics for all files.

tools.name: update_session_name
tools.description: Update the display name for the current CLI session

tools.name: open_diff
tools.description: Opens a diff view comparing original file content with new content. Blocks until user accepts, rejects, or closes the diff.

new_file_contents.description: The new file contents to compare against

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the content of a file.

filePath.description: Absolute path to the file to read

tools.name: close_diff
tools.description: Closes a diff tab by its tab name. Use this when the client rejects an edit to close the corresponding diff view.

tab_name.description: The tab name of the diff to close (must match the tab_name used when opening the diff)

tools.name: get_vscode_info
tools.description: Get information about the current VS Code instance
